category_sources: source_facts.description says regular expression grammar language dictionary generator; official homepage https://regldg.com/ explains regldg generates all strings matching a pattern.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is regldg; official homepage uses regldg as the project name at https://regldg.com/.
docs_sources: Official site https://regldg.com/ links to documentation pages for regex capabilities and Perl/regldg differences.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/PatrickCronin/regldg; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage https://regldg.com/ describe a regular-expression dictionary generator written in C.
